pains: Employee onboarding spans BambooHR, Okta, Jira, and Slack
Approvals lost in email with no audit trail
Zap chains break on schema changes
quotes: We spend 18+ hours/week updating five tools during onboarding.
Security wants dual approvals; email threads don't cut it.

current_workaround: ServiceNow tasks + CSV exports + email reminders
quotes: We fail QAR timelines because approvals sit in inboxes.
Auditors ask for immutable evidence we can't easily produce.

pains: Dual control for spend approvals not enforced
current_workaround: Google Forms intake + email + NetSuite updates by hand
quotes: We don't need 1,000 integrations. We need policy enforcement and speed.
Slack approvals would cut days off our cycle.

pains: Current Workato build is expensive to maintain
Business users can't see approval status
current_workaround: Workato + ServiceNow + Slack screenshots for evidence
quotes: If we can't see where approvals stall, we can't fix them.

pains: Approvals trapped in ITSM; clinicians wait days
No external data movement allowed for some fields
current_workaround: ServiceNow tickets + manual sign-offs stored as PDFs
quotes: We need approvals where people work, not buried in tickets.
Private connectors are a must for PHI-adjacent metadata.
